---
title: "motif-consensus-v1"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-09"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Preparation

## Directory
```{r}
working.dir <- "~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/motif_enrichment/5-consensus/"
```

## Libraries
```{r}
library(universalmotif)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
```

## Functions
```{r}
#' Cluster motifs from MEME/DREME/STREME and create consensus PWMs
#'
#' @param meme_files Character vector of paths to motif files (MEME format; DREME/STREME outputs are fine).
#' @param ic_floor Numeric. Drop motifs with mean information content below this (bits/position). Default 0.5.
#' @param min_overlap Integer. Minimum aligned overlap used for similarity. Default 6.
#' @param dist_method Character. Similarity metric for compare_motifs() ("PCC","EUCL","KL","ALLR"). Default "PCC".
#' @param linkage Character. Linkage for hierarchical clustering ("average","complete","single","ward.D2"). Default "average".
#' @param height Numeric. Dendrogram cut height on 1 - similarity (0–1). Smaller = tighter clusters. Default 0.35.
#' @param pseudocount Numeric. Pseudocount added when averaging PWMs. Default 0.1.
#' @param trim Logical. If TRUE, trim low-IC flanks before comparisons. Default TRUE.
#' @param out_prefix Character. Prefix for outputs (MEME file + CSV). Default "motif_consensus".
#'
#' @return A list with:
#' \itemize{
#'   \item consensus_motifs: list of universalmotif objects (cluster consensuses)
#'   \item cluster_table: data.frame mapping input motifs to cluster IDs and consensus IDs
#'   \item hc: hclust object used for clustering
#' }
#' @examples
#' # consensus <- cluster_motifs(c("meme.txt","streme.txt","dreme.txt"),
#' #                             height = 0.30, ic_floor = 0.6, out_prefix = "utr3_motifs")
#' @export
cluster_motifs <- function(meme_files,
                           ic_floor   = 0.5,
                           min_overlap= 6,
                           dist_method= "PCC",      # "PCC","EUCL","KL","ALLR" (universalmotif)
                           linkage    = "average",
                           height     = 0.35,       # dendrogram cut on distance
                           trim       = TRUE,
                           out_prefix = "motif_consensus") {
  # -- deps --
  pkgs <- c("universalmotif","dplyr","purrr","tibble")
  miss <- setdiff(pkgs, rownames(installed.packages()))
  if (length(miss)) install.packages(miss, repos="https://cloud.r-project.org")
  suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(universalmotif); library(dplyr); library(purrr); library(tibble)
  })

  # -- helpers --
  mean_ic <- function(m) {
    # universalmotif stores PPM in m@motif; max IC per pos is log2(|alphabet|). For DNA/RNA = 2.
    ppm <- as.matrix(m@motif)
    ppm <- sweep(ppm, 2, pmax(colSums(ppm), 1e-12), "/")
    H   <- -colSums(ppm * log2(pmax(ppm, 1e-12)))
    mean(2 - H)
  }

  # -- read & pool --
  all_motifs <- meme_files %>%
    map(~ read_meme(.x)) %>%  # list(list(universalmotif))
    flatten()

  if (length(all_motifs) < 2) stop("Need ≥2 motifs total.")

  # optional trimming of weak flanks (supported call signature)
  if (trim) all_motifs <- map(all_motifs, trim_motifs)

  # convert to PPM for consistent comparison
  all_motifs <- convert_motifs(all_motifs, "PPM")

  # filter by IC
  ic_vals <- vapply(all_motifs, mean_ic, numeric(1))
  kept <- all_motifs[ic_vals >= ic_floor]
  if (length(kept) < 2) stop("After IC filtering, fewer than 2 motifs remain.")

  # -- similarity + clustering --
  # compare_motifs returns a similarity matrix for the given method
  sim <- compare_motifs(kept, method = dist_method, min.overlap = min_overlap, tryRC = TRUE)

  # ensure full numeric matrix
  sim <- as.matrix(sim); diag(sim) <- 1

  # convert to distance
  dist_mat <- switch(
    dist_method,
    "PCC"  = 1 - abs(sim),
    "EUCL" = { m <- sim; maxv <- max(m[is.finite(m) & !is.na(m)]);  # EUCL is a distance already
               m[!is.finite(m)] <- maxv; diag(m) <- 0; m },
    # For KL/ALLR, larger = more similar per docs -> invert to distance
    "KL"   = { m <- sim; m <- max(m, na.rm=TRUE) - m; diag(m) <- 0; m },
    "ALLR" = { m <- sim; m <- max(m, na.rm=TRUE) - m; diag(m) <- 0; m },
    { stop("Unsupported dist_method for conversion: ", dist_method) }
  )

  dist_obj <- as.dist(dist_mat)
  hc <- hclust(dist_obj, method = linkage)

  clusters <- cutree(hc, h = height)
  cl_df <- tibble(idx = seq_along(kept),
                  motif_name = vapply(kept, function(m) ifelse(isTRUE(nzchar(m@name)), m@name, "unnamed"), character(1)),
                  cluster = clusters)

  # -- build consensus per cluster using merge_motifs() --
  consensus_list <- cl_df %>%
    group_split(cluster, .keep = TRUE) %>%
    map(function(df) {
      ms <- kept[df$idx]
      # merge_motifs handles strand/orientation and alignment internally
      cons <- merge_motifs(ms, method = "PCC", tryRC = TRUE)
      # set informative names
      cons@name    <- paste0("Cluster_", df$cluster[1], "_n", length(ms))
      cons@altname <- paste0("consensus_", df$cluster[1])
      cons
    })

  # -- export --
  write_meme(consensus_list, file = paste0(out_prefix, "_consensus.meme"))
  map_table <- cl_df %>% arrange(cluster) %>% mutate(consensus_id = paste0("Cluster_", cluster))
  write.csv(map_table, file = paste0(out_prefix, "_mapping.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  saveRDS(list(consensus_motifs = consensus_list,
               cluster_table = map_table,
               hc = hc,
               kept = kept,
               ic = ic_vals[ic_vals >= ic_floor],
               dist = dist_mat),
          file = paste0(out_prefix, "_objects.rds"))

  list(consensus_motifs = consensus_list,
       cluster_table = map_table,
       hc = hc)
}
```

# Deduplicate motifs
```{r}
setwd(working.dir)

meme_files <- c("meme_anr_w6-12_seed22.txt",
                "meme_zoops_w6-12_seed11.txt",
                "streme_w4-8_seed42.txt",
                "streme_w5-7_stringent_seed44.txt",
                "streme_w6-10_seed43.txt")
out_prefix  <- "motifs"
ic_floor    <- 0.5       # drop weak/degenerate motifs
min_overlap <- 6
dup_cut     <- 0.05      # distance cutoff for duplicates (PCC distance = 1 - |r|) -> 0.05 ~ PCC ≥ 0.95
e_value <- 0.05

## =========================
## 1) Read + normalize
## =========================
read_safe <- function(f) tryCatch(read_meme(f), error = function(e) list())
motifs <- meme_files %>% map(read_safe) %>% flatten()

# keep only valid objects
motifs <- motifs[vapply(motifs, inherits, logical(1), "universalmotif")]

## strip numeric prefixes in names (cosmetic)
for (i in seq_along(motifs)) {
  nm <- motifs[[i]]@name
  if (nzchar(nm)) motifs[[i]]@name <- str_remove(nm, "^[0-9]+[-_]*")
}

# keep only motifs with E ≤ 1e-3
# motifs <- Filter(function(m) {
#   val <- tryCatch(slot(m, "eval"), error = function(e) NA_real_)
#   !is.na(val) && val <= 1e-3
# }, motifs)


## =========================
## 2) Filter by mean IC
## =========================
mean_ic <- function(m){
  ppm <- sweep(as.matrix(m@motif), 2, pmax(colSums(m@motif), 1e-12), "/")
  H   <- -colSums(ppm * log2(pmax(ppm, 1e-12)))
  mean(2 - H)
}
IC <- vapply(motifs, mean_ic, numeric(1))
motifs <- motifs[IC >= ic_floor]
IC     <- IC[IC >= ic_floor]
stopifnot(length(motifs) >= 2)

# IC plot
df_ic <- tibble(mean_IC = IC)
print(ggplot(df_ic, aes(mean_IC)) + geom_histogram(bins=40) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = ic_floor, linetype=2) +
        labs(title="Mean IC after filtering", x="bits/pos", y="count"))

## =========================
## 3) Fast exact-duplicate removal (hashing)
##    (helps when tools output identical PWMs)
## =========================
hash_pwm <- function(m){
  mat <- round(as.matrix(m@motif), 4)         # round to avoid minor float noise
  paste(c(dim(mat), as.vector(mat)), collapse="|")
}
hashes <- vapply(motifs, hash_pwm, character(1))
first_idx <- !duplicated(hashes)
motifs_exact <- motifs[first_idx]
IC_exact     <- IC[first_idx]

cat(sprintf("[Exact dedup] Removed %d perfect duplicates\n", sum(!first_idx)))

## =========================
## 4) Near-duplicate clustering (PCC)
##    Treat motifs with PCC ≥ 0.95 as duplicates; keep top-IC representative
## =========================
sim <- compare_motifs(motifs_exact, method = "PCC", min.overlap = min_overlap, tryRC = TRUE)
sim <- as.matrix(sim); diag(sim) <- 1
dist_mat <- 1 - abs(sim)

# heatmap to inspect redundancy
rownames(dist_mat) <- colnames(dist_mat) <-
  vapply(motifs_exact, function(m) ifelse(nzchar(m@name), m@name, "motif"), character(1))
pheatmap(1 - dist_mat, cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
         main = "Similarity (PCC) before near-duplicate collapse")

hc <- hclust(as.dist(dist_mat), method = "average")
plot(hc, main = "Dendrogram (duplicates = tight branches)", xlab = "", sub = "")

dup_clusters <- cutree(hc, h = dup_cut)  # e.g., 0.05 -> PCC >= 0.95
tbl <- tibble(idx = seq_along(motifs_exact),
              name = rownames(dist_mat),
              cluster = dup_clusters,
              IC = IC_exact)

sizes <- count(tbl, cluster, name="size") %>% arrange(desc(size))
print(ggplot(sizes, aes(factor(cluster), size)) + geom_col() +
        labs(title="Near-duplicate cluster sizes", x="Cluster", y="# motifs"))

## Representative selection (highest IC per cluster; tie -> first by name)
rep_idx <- tbl %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = IC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(cluster, name) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  pull(idx)

motifs_dedup <- motifs_exact[rep_idx]
cat(sprintf("[Near-duplicate collapse] Representatives kept: %d (from %d)\n",
            length(motifs_dedup), length(motifs_exact)))

## =========================
## 5) Save outputs + mapping
## =========================
# mapping table: every original -> representative
rep_map <- tbl %>%
  mutate(rep_idx = match(cluster, tbl$cluster[rep_idx]),
         representative = tbl$name[rep_idx[match(cluster, tbl$cluster[rep_idx])]]) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(IC))

write.csv(rep_map, paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_mapping.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write_meme(motifs_dedup, file = paste0(out_prefix, "_deduplicated.meme"), overwrite = TRUE)

saveRDS(list(
  motifs_dedup = motifs_dedup,
  mapping      = rep_map,
  sim          = sim,
  dist_mat     = dist_mat,
  hc           = hc,
  IC_kept      = IC_exact
), file = paste0(out_prefix, "_dedup_objects.rds"))

cat(sprintf("\n[Done] Wrote %s_deduplicated.meme and %s_duplicate_mapping.csv\n",
            out_prefix, out_prefix))
```
